statement: Spring PetClinic is representative of the selected Java/Spring Boot monolith workload.
mitigation: Confirm workload representativeness with assessment reviewer or app owner.

statement: The local workstation baseline is acceptable as an on-prem VM simulation for hands-on evidence.
mitigation: Replace with actual VM facts in enterprise migration.

statement: PostgreSQL is the preferred managed DB target unless app-owner evidence shows MySQL is production-active.
mitigation: Confirm active runtime profile and production DB engine before database migration design.

statement: Maven and GitHub HTTPS flows are build-time dependencies, not production runtime dependencies.
mitigation: Validate with runtime logs and CI/CD design; move build egress to pipeline environment.

statement: Active production database engine is unclear because H2, PostgreSQL and MySQL are all present.
mitigation: Confirm active profile; capture runtime env vars; select one managed DB target; document fallback.

statement: Unknown inbound TCP 8443 may represent an undocumented endpoint or security exposure.
mitigation: Validate firewall/load-balancer logs and app-owner knowledge before cutover.

statement: SMTP-like TCP 25 egress is observed but not explained by the source scan.
mitigation: Confirm whether email/integration exists; either migrate relay allowlist or retire the flow.

statement: Sample DB passwords and Kubernetes secret material exist in repo artifacts.
mitigation: Move secrets to Key Vault or approved secret store; prevent secrets in pipeline logs.

statement: Actuator endpoints are broadly exposed in development config.
mitigation: Restrict management endpoint exposure in target config and protect with identity/network controls.

statement: Build dependencies on Maven/GitHub may fail behind restricted enterprise egress controls.
mitigation: Use approved artifact mirror, self-hosted agent or egress allowlist.

statement: Downtime tolerance and rollback window are not yet confirmed.
mitigation: Define business downtime window, DB cutover mode and rollback trigger in later runbook.

statement: Performance baseline is not yet established.
mitigation: Add baseline response-time and resource measurements before target sizing.

statement: Full reengineering before cloud baseline would increase scope and delivery risk.
mitigation: Defer full reengineering; limit rearchitecture to secrets/config/database externalization.

statement: Container target is not yet production-hardened.
mitigation: Add non-root image, health checks, scan gate, resource limits and observability in later modules.
